chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1624 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on M.A. No.6809/2022. 2. For orders on office objections appearing on reverse of memo of petition. 3. For orders on M.A. No.5894/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 24.05.2022 Mr. Suhbat Ali Lund, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Through this petition, the petitioner is only prayed that direction be issued to official respondents to provide certified true copies of the survey numbers 201, 202, 213, 214, 215, 230, 234, 235, 236, 231, 232, 211/1, 211/2, 792, 240-A, 240-B, 241-A, 241-B, 976 and 977 situated at Deh Khasa Chandia Tapo Makhdoom Sahib, Taluka and District Dadu from the year of 1925 to year of 1980. Learned counsel is unable to point out as to how the jurisdiction of this Court is invoked under Article 199 of the constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan,1973 as apparently no fundamental right is being violated, the petitioner could conveniently raise his grievance before a forum having jurisdiction, such as, either Revenue Department or a Civil Court, which can adjudicate the issues. Petition being misconceived is dismissed along-with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
